page_metadata.bioconda__summary: MUMmer is a system for rapidly aligning entire genomes
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Mummer is a modular system for the rapid whole genome alignment of finished or draft sequence. basically it is a ultra-fast alignment of large-scale dna and protein sequences
page_metadata.biotools__summary: MUMmer is a modular system for the rapid whole genome alignment of finished or draft sequence. Basically it is a ultra-fast alignment of large-scale DNA and protein sequences
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: MUMmer is a modular system for the rapid whole genome alignment of finished or draft sequence. Basically it is a ultra-fast alignment of large-scale DNA and protein sequences
